name: yaw_reversal_early
description: Variant of yaw_reversal.json that flips direction well BEFORE reaching steady state (at 0.3s, mid-spool, vs. 0.5s in the standard maneuver). Tests whether the reversal transient depends on how much rotation rate was already built up -- i.e. whether the effect is a function of current angular velocity at the moment of the flip, or a fixed post-flip response regardless of starting rate. Kept short for the same frame-exit reason as yaw_reversal.json.
